subcodes.first_line: Remember thou My servant, that the sweet-scented breezes of remembrance may draw thee unto the most exalted station. Arise, by God's leave, to fulfill thy Lord's command, then make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبدی لتجذبه نفحات الذکر الی اعلی المقام قم باذن الله علی امر ربک ثم اذکر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
